articles.title: Lululemon backs nylon-recycling startup Syntetica in $30M Series A
articles.description: Syntetica, a French startup that has developed a novel approach to recycling nylon, has already obtained big-name partners and investors.
articles.author: Anna Heim

articles.title: Applied Computing wants to give oil and gas operators an AI model for the entire plant
articles.description: Applied Computing has raised a $20M Series A to build a foundation AI model for the oil, gas and petrochemical industry.
articles.author: Ram Iyer

articles.title: Why Greylock capped its new fund at $1.5B when it says it could have raised more
articles.description: By keeping the number of investments to about 25 per fund, Greylock aims to remain what it calls "the most important partner" to its founders.
articles.author: Marina Temkin
